title: HoloscanRecognitionItem
description: The canonical shape of a HoloscanRecognitionItem record — docs/56-WPI-11-HOLOSCAN-ARCHITECTURE-FREEZE.md §11.2's candidate/draft/audit row, Batch WPI-11 (docs/50-PHASE-3-TECHNICAL-PLAN.md §19, ADR-024/025/026), governed by docs/53-PHASE-3-IMPLEMENTATION-RULES.md. One row per distinct medicine candidate a HoloscanRecognition's own vision-model call reported recognizing (holoscan-recognition.schema.json is the parent). Every extracted_*/confidence_score/check_flags field is immutable once written (the honest record of what the model actually produced) — only the single doctor_decision transition (plus its attendant fields) is ever written after creation, exactly once (docs/56 §11.2). Never gains a write path into MedicationHistory/MedicationDecision (ADR-025) — approving a candidate here never itself creates a MedicationHistory row. `check_flags`/`corrected_fields` follow docs/44 §11.4's JSON-storage policy exactly as AIAssistantInteraction.ai_output_flags already established: stored as JSON-encoded strings in the underlying Sheet cell, but this schema describes both as real array/object values, since apps-script/HoloscanRecognition.gs's own row-to-API-shape conversion always parses them back before returning a record to any caller.

recognition_item_id.description: Server-generated UUID (generateFoundationId_()), this row's own identity — never doctor- or patient-supplied.

patient_id.description: Denormalized from the parent, the same convention CarePlan/DoctorInstruction already use for direct roster-scoped queries (docs/56 §11.2).

source_image_ref.description: Which uploaded image (by drive_file_id) this candidate was extracted from, when attributable to one image. Empty-string sentinel when not attributable to a single image.

extracted_name.description: Raw OCR/vision-extracted medicine name. Empty-string sentinel when not legible or not present — never guessed (docs/56 §11.2/ADR-024).

confidence_score.description: The vision model's own reported confidence in its text extraction for this candidate (docs/56 §9) — extraction confidence only, never a clinical or catalog-match confidence. Passed through as-is, never recomputed.

check_flags.description: HoloscanRecognitionCheck_()'s advisory flags (docs/56 §10.2), an array of human-readable strings — empty array, not null, when clean. Stored as a JSON-encoded string in the underlying Sheet cell — an implementation-only detail.

catalog_match_status.description: Reserved, unbacked in this freeze (docs/56 §8/ADR-024) — no Medicine Catalog exists to match against. Always empty-string sentinel today.

catalog_match_ref.description: Reserved, unbacked in this freeze (docs/56 §8/ADR-024). Always empty-string sentinel today.

doctor_decision.description: Always 'pending' at creation; transitions one-way, exactly once, mirroring AIAssistantInteraction.doctor_decision's identical precedent. Recording a decision persists the decision only — it never itself writes to MedicationHistory (ADR-025).

corrected_fields.description: The doctor's field-level corrections, populated only when doctor_decision: 'corrected_and_approved'. Empty object otherwise. Stored as a JSON-encoded string in the underlying Sheet cell — an implementation-only detail.

decision_notes.description: Optional doctor rationale, empty-string sentinel when not supplied.

decided_by.description: doctor_id, DoctorSession-derived, set at decision time. Empty-string sentinel while still 'pending'.

decided_at.description: Server-set (foundationNowIso_()) at the moment doctor_decision transitions away from 'pending'. Empty-string sentinel while still pending.
